description: tokenomics capture mode — real-time token-waste flagging by reading the live session transcript incrementally. Best-effort, exits 0 fast, writes only to .tokenomics/.

hooks.command: uv run --project "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" python -m tokenomics.cli capture session-start
uv run --project "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" python -m tokenomics.cli capture prompt-submit
uv run --project "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" python -m tokenomics.cli capture post-tool
uv run --project "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" python -m tokenomics.cli capture stop
